children.value: 関数の足し合わせで近似する方法であり，以下で与えられる．

children.html: f(x)∼a02+∑n=1∞(ancos⁡nx+bnsin⁡nx)\begin{align} f(x) \sim \frac{a_0}{2} + \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} (a_n \cos nx + b_n \sin nx) \end{align}f(x)∼2a0​​+n=1∑∞​(an​cosnx+bn​sinnx)​​
a0,an,bna_0, a_n, b_na0​,an​,bn​

a0=1π∫−ππf(x)dxan=1π∫−ππf(x)cos⁡nxdx(n=1,2,3⋯ )bn=1π∫−ππf(x)sin⁡nxdx(n=1,2,3⋯ )\begin{align} a_{0}&=\frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) dx \\ a_{n}&=\frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos nx dx \quad(n=1,2,3 \cdots) \\ b_{n}&=\frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin n x d x \quad(n=1,2,3 \cdots) \end{align}a0​an​bn​​=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)dx=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)cosnxdx(n=1,2,3⋯)=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)sinnxdx(n=1,2,3⋯)​​

となることを確認する．

∫−ππcos⁡kxsin⁡lxdx=∫−ππ12{sin⁡(k+l)x−sin⁡(k−l)x}dx=12∫−ππsin⁡(k+l)xdx−12∫−ππsin⁡(k−l)xdx=0\begin{align} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx \sin lx dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \frac{1}{2} \left \{ \sin \left ( k+l \right ) x - \sin \left ( k - l \right ) x \right \} dx \\ &=\frac{1}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin \left ( k+l \right ) x dx - \frac{1}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin \left ( k - l \right ) x dx \\ &=0 \end{align}∫−ππ​coskxsinlxdx​=∫−ππ​21​{sin(k+l)x−sin(k−l)x}dx=21​∫−ππ​sin(k+l)xdx−21​∫−ππ​sin(k−l)xdx=0​​
k≠lk \neq lk=l

cos⁡lx\cos lxcoslx

∫−ππcos⁡kxcos⁡lxdx=∫−ππ12{cos⁡(k+l)x+cos⁡(k−l)x}dx=12∫−ππcos⁡(k+l)xdx+12∫−ππcos⁡(k−l)xdx=0\begin{align} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx \cos lx dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \frac{1}{2} \{ \cos \left ( k+l \right ) x + \cos \left ( k - l \right ) x \} dx \\ &=\frac{1}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos \left ( k+l \right ) x dx + \frac{1}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos \left ( k - l \right ) x dx \\ &=0 \end{align}∫−ππ​coskxcoslxdx​=∫−ππ​21​{cos(k+l)x+cos(k−l)x}dx=21​∫−ππ​cos(k+l)xdx+21​∫−ππ​cos(k−l)xdx=0​​
k≠lk \neq lk=l

sin⁡lx\sin lxsinlx

∫−ππsin⁡kxsin⁡lxdx=∫−ππ12{cos⁡(k−l)x−cos⁡(k+l)x}dx=12∫−ππcos⁡(k−l)xdx−12∫−ππcos⁡(k+l)xdx=0\begin{align} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx \sin lx dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \frac{1}{2} \{ \cos \left ( k-l \right ) x - \cos \left ( k + l \right ) x \} dx \\ &=\frac{1}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos \left ( k-l \right ) x dx - \frac{1}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos \left ( k + l \right ) x dx \\ &=0 \end{align}∫−ππ​sinkxsinlxdx​=∫−ππ​21​{cos(k−l)x−cos(k+l)x}dx=21​∫−ππ​cos(k−l)xdx−21​∫−ππ​cos(k+l)xdx=0​​

f(x)≈∑k=1nckϕk(x)=c1ϕ1(x)+c2ϕ2(x)+⋯cnϕn(x)\begin{align} f(x) &\approx \sum_{k=1}^{n} c_{k} \phi_{k}(x)\\ &=c_1 \phi_{1}(x)+c_2 \phi_{2}(x) + \cdots c_n \phi_n(x) \end{align}f(x)​≈k=1∑n​ck​ϕk​(x)=c1​ϕ1​(x)+c2​ϕ2​(x)+⋯cn​ϕn​(x)​​

children.value: で均一に近似するように次の最小化問題を考えることで関数の近似を最小二乗法から行うことができた．さらに直交関数系で設計した

children.value: の性質より正規方程式の導出から係数

children.html: cic_ici​

children.value: は以下の形でシンプルに書くことができた．
c_i = \frac{\int_{a}^{b} \phi_{i} \left ( x \right ) f \left ( x \right) dx }{\int_{a}^{b} \phi_{i} \left ( x \right )^2 dx }, \qquad i=1,...,n
children.html: ci=∫abϕi(x)f(x)dx∫abϕi(x)2dx,i=1,...,nc_i = \frac{\int_{a}^{b} \phi_{i} \left ( x \right ) f \left ( x \right) dx }{\int_{a}^{b} \phi_{i} \left ( x \right )^2 dx }, \qquad i=1,...,nci​=∫ab​ϕi​(x)2dx∫ab​ϕi​(x)f(x)dx​,i=1,...,n
a0,ak,bka_0, a_k, b_ka0​,ak​,bk​

children.value: を導出する．まず，定数項

children.html: a0/2a_0/2a0​/2
ϕ0\phi_0ϕ0​

children.value: であることに注意して計算すると

children.html: a02=c0=∫−ππ1⋅f(x)dx∫−ππ12dx=∫−ππf(x)dx2π=12π∫−ππf(x)dxa0=1π∫−ππf(x)dx\begin{align} \frac{a_0}{2} = c_0 &= \frac{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} 1 \cdot f(x) dx}{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} 1^2 dx} \\ &= \frac{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) dx}{2\pi} \\ &= \frac{1}{2\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) dx \\ a_0 &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) dx \\ \end{align}2a0​​=c0​a0​​=∫−ππ​12dx∫−ππ​1⋅f(x)dx​=2π∫−ππ​f(x)dx​=2π1​∫−ππ​f(x)dx=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)dx​​
cos⁡\coscos
kkk
aka_kak​

ak=ck=∫−ππcos⁡kxf(x)dx∫−ππcos⁡2kxdx=∫−ππf(x)cos⁡kxdxπ=1π∫−ππf(x)cos⁡kxdx\begin{align} a_k = c_k &= \frac{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx f(x) dx}{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos^2 kx dx} \\ &= \frac{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos kx dx}{\pi} \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos kx dx \\ \end{align}ak​=ck​​=∫−ππ​cos2kxdx∫−ππ​coskxf(x)dx​=π∫−ππ​f(x)coskxdx​=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)coskxdx​​
sin⁡\sinsin
kkk
bkb_kbk​

bk=ck=∫−ππsin⁡kxf(x)dx∫−ππsin⁡2kxdx=∫−ππf(x)sin⁡kxdxπ=1π∫−ππf(x)sin⁡kxdx\begin{align} b_k = c_k &= \frac{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx f(x) dx}{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin^2 kx dx} \\ &= \frac{\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin kx dx}{\pi} \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin kx dx \\ \end{align}bk​=ck​​=∫−ππ​sin2kxdx∫−ππ​sinkxf(x)dx​=π∫−ππ​f(x)sinkxdx​=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)sinkxdx​​

children.value: 以上より，フーリエ級数展開のフーリエ級数を (1) 関数の最小二乗法 から導出できた．
三角関数系の直交性からの導出
続いて，(2) 三角関数系の直交性 からの導出について線形結合の式
f(x) = \frac{a_{0}}{2} + a_{1} \cos x + b_{1} \sin x + a_{2} \cos 2x + b_{2} \sin 2x + \cdots
children.html: f(x)=a02+a1cos⁡x+b1sin⁡x+a2cos⁡2x+b2sin⁡2x+⋯f(x) = \frac{a_{0}}{2} + a_{1} \cos x + b_{1} \sin x + a_{2} \cos 2x + b_{2} \sin 2x + \cdotsf(x)=2a0​​+a1​cosx+b1​sinx+a2​cos2x+b2​sin2x+⋯

children.value: からスタートして，自身以外との関数の内積が
となるという直交関数系の性質を活用することを考える．

children.html: a0a_0a0​

children.value: の導出は上記の線型結合の式の両辺に

children.html: [−π,π][-\pi, \pi][−π,π]

children.value: で積分することで導出できる．

\begin{align}
\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} 1 \cdot f(x) dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} 1 \cdot \left \{ \frac{a_{0}}{2} + a_{1} \cos x + b_{1} \sin x + a_{2} \cos 2x + b_{2} \sin 2x + \cdots \right \} dx \\
&= \frac{a_0}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} 1 dx+ a_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos x dx +  b_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin x dx \\
& \quad + a_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos 2x dx +  b_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin 2x dx  + \cdots \\
&= a_0 \pi \\
a_0 &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) dx
\end{align}
children.html: ∫−ππ1⋅f(x)dx=∫−ππ1⋅{a02+a1cos⁡x+b1sin⁡x+a2cos⁡2x+b2sin⁡2x+⋯ }dx=a02∫−ππ1dx+a1∫−ππcos⁡xdx+b1∫−ππsin⁡xdx+a2∫−ππcos⁡2xdx+b2∫−ππsin⁡2xdx+⋯=a0πa0=1π∫−ππf(x)dx\begin{align} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} 1 \cdot f(x) dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} 1 \cdot \left \{ \frac{a_{0}}{2} + a_{1} \cos x + b_{1} \sin x + a_{2} \cos 2x + b_{2} \sin 2x + \cdots \right \} dx \\ &= \frac{a_0}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} 1 dx+ a_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos x dx + b_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin x dx \\ & \quad + a_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos 2x dx + b_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin 2x dx + \cdots \\ &= a_0 \pi \\ a_0 &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) dx \end{align}∫−ππ​1⋅f(x)dxa0​​=∫−ππ​1⋅{2a0​​+a1​cosx+b1​sinx+a2​cos2x+b2​sin2x+⋯}dx=2a0​​∫−ππ​1dx+a1​∫−ππ​cosxdx+b1​∫−ππ​sinxdx+a2​∫−ππ​cos2xdx+b2​∫−ππ​sin2xdx+⋯=a0​π=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)dx​​
aka_kak​

children.value: の導出は上記の線型結合の式の両辺に

children.html: cos⁡kx\cos kxcoskx
[−π,π][-\pi, \pi][−π,π]

children.value: で積分することで導出できる．

\begin{align}
\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos kx dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx \left \{ \frac{a_{0}}{2} + a_{1} \cos x + b_{1} \sin x + a_{2} \cos 2x + b_{2} \sin 2x + \cdots \right \} dx \\
&= \frac{a_0}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx dx+ a_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos x \cos kx dx +  b_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin x \cos kx dx \\
& \quad + a_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos 2x \cos kx dx +  b_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin 2x \cos kx dx  + \cdots \\
& \qquad + a_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx \cos kx dx +  b_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx \cos kx dx  + \cdots \\
&= a_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos^2 kx dx \\
&= a_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\ \frac{1}{2} \left ( 1 + \cos 2kx \right ) dx \\
&= a_k \pi \\
a_k &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos kx dx
\end{align}
children.html: ∫−ππf(x)cos⁡kxdx=∫−ππcos⁡kx{a02+a1cos⁡x+b1sin⁡x+a2cos⁡2x+b2sin⁡2x+⋯ }dx=a02∫−ππcos⁡kxdx+a1∫−ππcos⁡xcos⁡kxdx+b1∫−ππsin⁡xcos⁡kxdx+a2∫−ππcos⁡2xcos⁡kxdx+b2∫−ππsin⁡2xcos⁡kxdx+⋯+ak∫−ππcos⁡kxcos⁡kxdx+bk∫−ππsin⁡kxcos⁡kxdx+⋯=ak∫−ππcos⁡2kxdx=ak∫−ππ 12(1+cos⁡2kx)dx=akπak=1π∫−ππf(x)cos⁡kxdx\begin{align} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos kx dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx \left \{ \frac{a_{0}}{2} + a_{1} \cos x + b_{1} \sin x + a_{2} \cos 2x + b_{2} \sin 2x + \cdots \right \} dx \\ &= \frac{a_0}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx dx+ a_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos x \cos kx dx + b_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin x \cos kx dx \\ & \quad + a_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos 2x \cos kx dx + b_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin 2x \cos kx dx + \cdots \\ & \qquad + a_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx \cos kx dx + b_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx \cos kx dx + \cdots \\ &= a_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos^2 kx dx \\ &= a_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\ \frac{1}{2} \left ( 1 + \cos 2kx \right ) dx \\ &= a_k \pi \\ a_k &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos kx dx \end{align}∫−ππ​f(x)coskxdxak​​=∫−ππ​coskx{2a0​​+a1​cosx+b1​sinx+a2​cos2x+b2​sin2x+⋯}dx=2a0​​∫−ππ​coskxdx+a1​∫−ππ​cosxcoskxdx+b1​∫−ππ​sinxcoskxdx+a2​∫−ππ​cos2xcoskxdx+b2​∫−ππ​sin2xcoskxdx+⋯+ak​∫−ππ​coskxcoskxdx+bk​∫−ππ​sinkxcoskxdx+⋯=ak​∫−ππ​cos2kxdx=ak​∫−ππ​ 21​(1+cos2kx)dx=ak​π=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)coskxdx​​
bkb_kbk​

children.value: の導出は上記の線型結合の式の両辺に

children.html: sin⁡kx\sin kxsinkx
[−π,π][-\pi, \pi][−π,π]

children.value: で積分することで導出できる．

\begin{align}
\int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin kx dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx \left \{ \frac{a_{0}}{2} + a_{1} \cos x + b_{1} \sin x + a_{2} \cos 2x + b_{2} \sin 2x + \cdots \right \} dx \\
&= \frac{a_0}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx dx+ a_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\ \cos x \sin kx dx +  b_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\ \sin x \sin kx dx \\
& \quad + a_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos 2x \sin kx dx +  b_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin 2x \sin kx dx  + \cdots \\
& \qquad + a_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx \sin kx dx +  b_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx \sin kx dx  + \cdots \\
&= b_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin^2 kx dx \\
&= b_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\ \frac{1}{2} \left ( 1 - \cos 2kx \right ) dx \\
&= b_k \pi \\
b_k &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin kx dx
\end{align}
children.html: ∫−ππf(x)sin⁡kxdx=∫−ππsin⁡kx{a02+a1cos⁡x+b1sin⁡x+a2cos⁡2x+b2sin⁡2x+⋯ }dx=a02∫−ππsin⁡kxdx+a1∫−ππ cos⁡xsin⁡kxdx+b1∫−ππ sin⁡xsin⁡kxdx+a2∫−ππcos⁡2xsin⁡kxdx+b2∫−ππsin⁡2xsin⁡kxdx+⋯+ak∫−ππcos⁡kxsin⁡kxdx+bk∫−ππsin⁡kxsin⁡kxdx+⋯=bk∫−ππsin⁡2kxdx=bk∫−ππ 12(1−cos⁡2kx)dx=bkπbk=1π∫−ππf(x)sin⁡kxdx\begin{align} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin kx dx &= \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx \left \{ \frac{a_{0}}{2} + a_{1} \cos x + b_{1} \sin x + a_{2} \cos 2x + b_{2} \sin 2x + \cdots \right \} dx \\ &= \frac{a_0}{2} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx dx+ a_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\ \cos x \sin kx dx + b_1 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\ \sin x \sin kx dx \\ & \quad + a_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos 2x \sin kx dx + b_2 \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin 2x \sin kx dx + \cdots \\ & \qquad + a_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \cos kx \sin kx dx + b_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin kx \sin kx dx + \cdots \\ &= b_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} \sin^2 kx dx \\ &= b_k \int_{-\pi}^{\pi}\ \frac{1}{2} \left ( 1 - \cos 2kx \right ) dx \\ &= b_k \pi \\ b_k &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin kx dx \end{align}∫−ππ​f(x)sinkxdxbk​​=∫−ππ​sinkx{2a0​​+a1​cosx+b1​sinx+a2​cos2x+b2​sin2x+⋯}dx=2a0​​∫−ππ​sinkxdx+a1​∫−ππ​ cosxsinkxdx+b1​∫−ππ​ sinxsinkxdx+a2​∫−ππ​cos2xsinkxdx+b2​∫−ππ​sin2xsinkxdx+⋯+ak​∫−ππ​coskxsinkxdx+bk​∫−ππ​sinkxsinkxdx+⋯=bk​∫−ππ​sin2kxdx=bk​∫−ππ​ 21​(1−cos2kx)dx=bk​π=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)sinkxdx​​

children.value: 以上より，フーリエ級数展開のフーリエ級数を (2) 三角関数系の直交性 から導出できた．

children.html: [−π,π][-\pi, \pi][−π,π]
f(x)f(x)f(x)

children.value: についてフーリエ級数展開してみよう．

children.html: f(x)={1−π<x≤000<x≤πf(x) = \begin{cases} 1 & -\pi < x \leq 0 \\ 0 & 0 < x \leq \pi \end{cases}f(x)={10​−π<x≤00<x≤π​

children.value: 解答はクリックで確認できる．

children.html: a0,ak,bka_0, a_k, b_ka0​,ak​,bk​

children.value: を順に計算する．まずフーリエ係数

children.html: a0a_0a0​

children.value: を上記で導出したフーリエ係数の式から計算する．

$$
\begin{align}
a_{0}&=\frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) dx \\
a_{n}&=\frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos nx dx \quad(n=1,2,3 \cdots) \\
b_{n}&=\frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin n x d x \quad(n=1,2,3 \cdots)
\end{align}
$$

children.html: a0=1π∫−ππf(x)dx=1π{∫−π01dx+∫0π0dx}=1π[x]−π0=1π{0+π}=1\begin{align} a_0 &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) dx \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left\{ \int_{-\pi}^{0} 1 dx + \int_{0}^{\pi} 0 dx \right\} \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left [ x \right ]^{0}_{-\pi} \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left \{ 0 + \pi \right \} = 1 \end{align}a0​​=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)dx=π1​{∫−π0​1dx+∫0π​0dx}=π1​[x]−π0​=π1​{0+π}=1​​
aka_kak​

children.value: は以下のように計算できる．

\begin{align}
a_k &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos kx dx \\
&= \frac{1}{\pi} \left\{ \int_{-\pi}^{0} 1 \cdot \cos kx dx + \int_{0}^{\pi} 0 \cdot \cos kx dx \right\} \\
&= \frac{1}{\pi} \left [ \frac{1}{k} \sin kx \right ]^{0}_{-\pi} \\
&= \frac{1}{\pi} \left \{ \frac{1}{k} \sin 0 - \frac{1}{k} \sin \left ( -k \pi \right ) \right \} \\
&= \frac{1}{k\pi} \sin k\pi = 0
\end{align}
children.html: ak=1π∫−ππf(x)cos⁡kxdx=1π{∫−π01⋅cos⁡kxdx+∫0π0⋅cos⁡kxdx}=1π[1ksin⁡kx]−π0=1π{1ksin⁡0−1ksin⁡(−kπ)}=1kπsin⁡kπ=0\begin{align} a_k &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \cos kx dx \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left\{ \int_{-\pi}^{0} 1 \cdot \cos kx dx + \int_{0}^{\pi} 0 \cdot \cos kx dx \right\} \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left [ \frac{1}{k} \sin kx \right ]^{0}_{-\pi} \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left \{ \frac{1}{k} \sin 0 - \frac{1}{k} \sin \left ( -k \pi \right ) \right \} \\ &= \frac{1}{k\pi} \sin k\pi = 0 \end{align}ak​​=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)coskxdx=π1​{∫−π0​1⋅coskxdx+∫0π​0⋅coskxdx}=π1​[k1​sinkx]−π0​=π1​{k1​sin0−k1​sin(−kπ)}=kπ1​sinkπ=0​​
bkb_kbk​

children.value: は以下のように計算できる．

\begin{align}
b_k &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin kx dx \\
&= \frac{1}{\pi} \left\{ \int_{-\pi}^{0} 1 \cdot \sin kx dx + \int_{0}^{\pi} 0 \cdot \sin kx dx \right\} \\
&= \frac{1}{\pi} \left [ - \frac{1}{k} \cos kx \right ]^{0}_{-\pi} \\
&= \frac{1}{\pi} \left \{ - \frac{1}{k} \cos 0 + \frac{1}{k} \cos \left ( -k \pi \right ) \right \} \\
&= - \frac{1}{k \pi} \left (1 - \cos k \pi \right ) \\
&= - \frac{1}{k \pi} \left \{1 - \left ( -1 \right )^k \right \} \\
\end{align}
children.html: bk=1π∫−ππf(x)sin⁡kxdx=1π{∫−π01⋅sin⁡kxdx+∫0π0⋅sin⁡kxdx}=1π[−1kcos⁡kx]−π0=1π{−1kcos⁡0+1kcos⁡(−kπ)}=−1kπ(1−cos⁡kπ)=−1kπ{1−(−1)k}\begin{align} b_k &= \frac{1}{\pi} \int_{-\pi}^{\pi} f(x) \sin kx dx \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left\{ \int_{-\pi}^{0} 1 \cdot \sin kx dx + \int_{0}^{\pi} 0 \cdot \sin kx dx \right\} \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left [ - \frac{1}{k} \cos kx \right ]^{0}_{-\pi} \\ &= \frac{1}{\pi} \left \{ - \frac{1}{k} \cos 0 + \frac{1}{k} \cos \left ( -k \pi \right ) \right \} \\ &= - \frac{1}{k \pi} \left (1 - \cos k \pi \right ) \\ &= - \frac{1}{k \pi} \left \{1 - \left ( -1 \right )^k \right \} \\ \end{align}bk​​=π1​∫−ππ​f(x)sinkxdx=π1​{∫−π0​1⋅sinkxdx+∫0π​0⋅sinkxdx}=π1​[−k1​coskx]−π0​=π1​{−k1​cos0+k1​cos(−kπ)}=−kπ1​(1−coskπ)=−kπ1​{1−(−1)k}​​

children.value: 以上より，フーリエ係数が以下のように計算された．

children.html: a0=1,ak=0,bk=−1kπ{1−(−1)k}\begin{align} a_0 = 1, \quad a_k = 0, \quad b_k = - \frac{1}{k \pi} \left \{1 - \left ( -1 \right )^k \right \} \end{align}a0​=1,ak​=0,bk​=−kπ1​{1−(−1)k}​​

children.value: これをフーリエ級数展開の式に代入する．

\begin{align}
f(x) &\approx \frac{a_0}{2} + \sum_{k=1}^{\infty} (a_k \cos kx + b_k \sin kx) \\
&= \frac{1}{2} + \sum_{k=1}^{\infty} \left [0 \cdot \cos kx - \frac{1}{k \pi} \left \{1 - \left ( -1 \right )^k \right \} \sin kx \right] \\
&= \frac{1}{2}  - \frac{1}{\pi} \sum_{k=1}^{\infty} \left [ \frac{\left \{1 - \left ( -1 \right )^k \right \}}{k} \sin kx \right] \\
&= \frac{1}{2}  - \frac{2}{\pi} \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \left [ \frac{1}{2n - 1} \sin (2n-1)x \right] \\
&= \frac{1}{2}  - \frac{2}{\pi} \left ( \sin x + \frac{1}{3} \sin 3x + \frac{1}{5} \sin 5x + \cdots  \right )
\end{align}
children.html: f(x)≈a02+∑k=1∞(akcos⁡kx+bksin⁡kx)=12+∑k=1∞[0⋅cos⁡kx−1kπ{1−(−1)k}sin⁡kx]=12−1π∑k=1∞[{1−(−1)k}ksin⁡kx]=12−2π∑n=1∞[12n−1sin⁡(2n−1)x]=12−2π(sin⁡x+13sin⁡3x+15sin⁡5x+⋯ )\begin{align} f(x) &\approx \frac{a_0}{2} + \sum_{k=1}^{\infty} (a_k \cos kx + b_k \sin kx) \\ &= \frac{1}{2} + \sum_{k=1}^{\infty} \left [0 \cdot \cos kx - \frac{1}{k \pi} \left \{1 - \left ( -1 \right )^k \right \} \sin kx \right] \\ &= \frac{1}{2} - \frac{1}{\pi} \sum_{k=1}^{\infty} \left [ \frac{\left \{1 - \left ( -1 \right )^k \right \}}{k} \sin kx \right] \\ &= \frac{1}{2} - \frac{2}{\pi} \sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \left [ \frac{1}{2n - 1} \sin (2n-1)x \right] \\ &= \frac{1}{2} - \frac{2}{\pi} \left ( \sin x + \frac{1}{3} \sin 3x + \frac{1}{5} \sin 5x + \cdots \right ) \end{align}f(x)​≈2a0​​+k=1∑∞​(ak​coskx+bk​sinkx)=21​+k=1∑∞​[0⋅coskx−kπ1​{1−(−1)k}sinkx]=21​−π1​k=1∑∞​⎣⎡​k{1−(−1)k}​sinkx⎦⎤​=21​−π2​n=1∑∞​[2n−11​sin(2n−1)x]=21​−π2​(sinx+31​sin3x+51​sin5x+⋯)​​

children.value: 以上より，与えられた関数

children.html: f(x)f(x)f(x)

children.value: のフーリエ級数展開を求めることができた．

children.html: kkk

children.value: が偶数のときは項が0となるので奇数のみを扱うよう

children.html: k=2n−1k=2n-1k=2n−1

children.value: として式を整理している．また，この関数は

children.html: x=0x=0x=0

children.value: で不連続であるため，フーリエ級数は不連続点では左右極限の平均

children.html: 1/21/21/2
[−π,π][-\pi,\pi][−π,π]

children.value: の外では，元の関数そのものではなく，この区間で定義した形を周期

children.html: 2π2\pi2π

children.value: で繰り返した周期的拡張を近似していることにも注意する．
Pythonによるフーリエ級数展開の実装

children.label: Pythonによるフーリエ級数展開の実装

children.value: では，本日説明したフーリエ級数展開をPythonで実装する．まずは変数

children.html: xxx
f(x)f(x)f(x)

children.value:
from sympy import symbols, cos, sin, pi
x = symbols('x')

f = 1 + 0.25 * cos(x) - 1.1 * sin(2*x) + cos(3*x) - 0.4 * sin(4*x)
f

from sympy.plotting import plot
plot(f, xlim=(-pi, pi) , ylim=(-5, 5))
導出したフーリエ係数

children.html: a0,ak,bka_0, a_k, b_ka0​,ak​,bk​

children.value:
from sympy import Integral
k = symbols('k')
a_0 = Integral(f, (x, -pi, pi)) / pi
a_0

a_k = Integral(f * cos(k * x), (x, -pi, pi)) / pi
a_k

b_k = Integral(f * sin(k * x), (x, -pi, pi)) / pi
b_k
定義できたので，フーリエ係数の計算を実行する．今回は

children.html: k=3k=3k=3

children.value: まで展開してみよう．具体的には

children.html: kkk

children.value: 番目の項を変数として定義していたので
で代入し，上記で定義した

children.html: ak,bka_k,b_kak​,bk​

children.value:
# b_0 は級数には現れないが，確認用に計算する．
b_0 = b_k.subs(k, 0).doit()
b_0

children.html: k=3k=3k=3

children.value: までのフーリエ係数をもとにフーリエ級数展開する．
ff_approx = a_0.doit() / 2 + a_1 * cos(x) + b_1 * sin(x) + a_2 * cos(2*x) + b_2 * sin(2*x) + a_3 * cos(3*x) + b_3 * sin(3*x)
計算した近似式を表示する．
近似対象と比較をするために同時にプロットしてみる．
